title: Standard-to-Control Mapping
description: Explicit, documented linkage between a specific clause in a registered external standard and a platform control. Provides the provenance chain. Lives in 05-mappings/.

source_clause.description: Specific clause, section, or check within the standard. Use [PLACEHOLDER: ...] if unresearched.

source_clause_text.description: Brief quoted text from the standard clause for human reference.

rationale.description: Why this clause was interpreted as this control in this platform's context.

mapping_type.description: derived: control is a direct derivation of the clause. partial: clause partially covered. extended: control goes beyond the clause.
